title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish, inspired by the traditional Saudi Arabian cuisine, with tender lamb and delicate spices.

ingredients.name: Delicate Spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the roasted red peppers, delicate spices, tomato paste, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Braise the lamb for 2.5 hours, or until tender and easily shredded with a fork.
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
